input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.8.2.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.8.2.5
            TITLE: high voltage charging leads must be orange

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.8.2.5: High Voltage charging leads must be orange
EV.8.2.5 High Voltage charging leads must be orange

final_answer: High Voltage charging leads must be orange
